claim: The repository now has an additive ledger that distinguishes observed, inferred, proposed, superseded, and unresolved claim transitions without deleting earlier continuity records.

verification.method: GitHub contents write acknowledgement plus source review against cited continuity and queue blobs

privacy_boundary: Only public repository metadata and abstract project-state claims were included. Raw private chat, health or pet-health material, credentials, personal identifiers, and unreviewed uploads were excluded.
limits: The ledger has no automated schema validator yet.
Commit existence was observed for selected recent commits, but full ancestry was not independently reconstructed.
The Cloudflare deployment remains unresolved; implementation commits are not deployment proof.
falsification_or_review_route: Fetch the artifact at its commit, parse it as JSON, verify every cited source exists, and reject any transition whose prior/current records or authority relationship do not match the cited blobs.
